name: foodhub
description: FoodHub — a modern food ordering, dine-in and reservation app built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS and Capacitor.

scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap run ios
